scripts.tauri:build:full: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.full.conf.json && pnpm bundle:stage:full
scripts.tauri:build:full:app: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.full.conf.json --bundles app && pnpm bundle:stage:full
scripts.tauri:build:full:dmg: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.full.conf.json --bundles app --no-sign && pnpm bundle:stage:full && node ../../scripts/create-desktop-dmg.mjs full
scripts.tauri:build:full:dmg:nosign: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.full.conf.json --bundles app --no-sign && pnpm bundle:stage:full && node ../../scripts/create-desktop-dmg.mjs full
scripts.tauri:build:lite: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.lite.conf.json && pnpm bundle:stage:lite
scripts.tauri:build:lite:app: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.lite.conf.json --bundles app && pnpm bundle:stage:lite
scripts.tauri:build:lite:dmg: pnpm prepare:runtime && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.lite.conf.json --bundles app --no-sign && pnpm bundle:stage:lite && node ../../scripts/create-desktop-dmg.mjs lite
